body.hr:
Duljina × ring gauge (64-ine inča) govore koliko dugo pušiš i kako se dim hladi. Uži format (lancero, corona) hladi se brže i ističe nijanse; debeli robusto/toro drži toplinu i tijelo. Smoke time na kartici je orijentir, ne sat.

Brzi orijentir: robusto (~50 × 124 mm) ≈ 45–60 min; Churchill (~47 × 178 mm) ≈ 75–90 min; belicoso/torpedo su figurado s suženom kapom.
body.en:
Length × ring gauge (64ths of an inch) tell you how long you smoke and how the smoke cools. Narrow formats (lancero, corona) cool faster and show nuance; fat robusto/toro hold heat and body. The listed smoke time is a guide, not a clock.

Quick compass: robusto (~50 × 124 mm) ≈ 45–60 min; Churchill (~47 × 178 mm) ≈ 75–90 min; belicoso/torpedo are figurados with a tapered head.

body.hr:
Snaga = nikotin (koliko »udara«). Tijelo = punoća okusa i gustoća dima. Cigara može biti puna okusa, a blaga nikotinom — i obrnuto.

Za pairing gledaj tijelo uz tijelo pića. Snagu biraj prema ritmu dana: jutarnja Connecticut blaga; večernja maduro može nositi više nikotina. Ako ti se vrti u glavi, uspori tempo i pij vodu.
body.en:
Strength = nicotine (how hard it hits). Body = flavour fullness and smoke density. A cigar can be full-flavoured yet mild in nicotine — and vice versa.

For pairing, match body to drink body. Pick strength for the time of day: a morning Connecticut stays mild; an evening maduro can carry more nicotine. If you feel light-headed, slow the pace and drink water.

title.en: Wrapper: the first aroma you meet

body.hr:
Omotač daje velik dio mirisa i boje. Connecticut Shade — svijetao, blag, kremast. Habano/Criollo — začinski, srednje tijelo. Maduro — tamniji, dulje fermentiran, note kakaa i kave. Oscuro/maduro-oscuro — najtamniji kraj spektra.

Puro = sva tri lista (capa, capote, tripa) iz iste zemlje. Kubanske cigare su uvijek puros.
body.en:
The wrapper drives much of the nose and colour. Connecticut Shade — pale, mild, creamy. Habano/Criollo — spicy, medium body. Maduro — darker, longer fermented, cocoa and coffee notes. Oscuro — the darkest end of the spectrum.

A puro uses wrapper, binder and filler from one country. Cuban cigars are always puros.

body.hr:
Španjolski cedar (ili cedar ploče) pomaže stabilizirati vlagu i miris. Digihigrometar je pouzdaniji od analognih. Presuha cigara gori vruće i gorko; prevlažna teško vuče i može pljesniviti.

Novi humidor treba »začiniti« — navlažiti cedar 3–7 dana prije nego staviš cigare. Boveda (ili slični) paketi olakšavaju održavanje. Ne otvaraj kutiju svaki sat — vlaga treba mir.
body.en:
Spanish cedar (or cedar trays) helps stabilise humidity and aroma. A digital hygrometer beats analogue dials. Too dry burns hot and bitter; too damp draws poorly and can mould.

Season a new humidor — humidify the cedar for 3–7 days — before you store cigars. Boveda-style packs ease upkeep. Do not open the box every hour — humidity needs calm.

body.hr:
Ravni (guillotine) reže kapu ravno — najčešći izbor. V-cut otvara klin i usmjerava dim. Punch buši mali otvor — manje otpada, uži vučni kanal.

Cilj: otvoriti kapu bez kidanja omotača. Oštar rezač i jedan čist rez. Na figurado (torpedo) V-cut ili pažljiv ravni rez pri vrhu često sjeda bolje od dubokog puncha.
body.en:
A straight (guillotine) cut opens the cap cleanly — the usual choice. A V-cut makes a wedge that channels smoke. A punch drills a small hole — less waste, a tighter draw.

Goal: open the cap without tearing the wrapper. A sharp cutter and one clean cut. On a figurado (torpedo), a V-cut or a careful straight cut near the tip often beats a deep punch.

body.hr:
Butan upaljač ili duge šibice / cedar spill. Drži plamen ispod stopala, vrti cigaru dok se rub ravnomjerno užari, pa tek onda povuci. Benzinski upaljač ostavlja miris u prvim dimovima.

Ne peči omotač bočno. Ako jedna strana gori brže (canoeing), lagano okreni cigaru ili kratko zagrij sporiju stranu.
body.en:
Butane lighter or long matches / a cedar spill. Hold the flame under the foot, rotate until the rim glows evenly, then draw. Petrol lighters taint the first puffs.

Do not scorch the wrapper from the side. If one side runs ahead (canoeing), rotate the cigar or briefly warm the slower side.

body.hr:
Polako: cigara nije cigareta. 30–60 sekundi između povlačenja drži temperaturu. Prebrzo peče i gorko završava.

Ako vuče preteško, punch može biti premali ili cigara prevlažna. Ako vuče prelako i gori vruće — možda je presuha ili previše otvoren rez. Pepeo ostavi dok sam ne padne; potucanje po pepeljari kida sagorevanje.
body.en:
Slow down: a cigar is not a cigarette. 30–60 seconds between draws keeps the temperature. Too fast and it burns bitter.

A tight draw may mean too small a punch or a damp cigar. A loose, hot draw may mean over-dry leaf or an oversized cut. Let ash fall on its own; tapping the ashtray breaks the burn line.

body.hr:
Jednostavno pravilo: blaga Connecticut uz VSOP/VS konjak, fino sherry ili lagani rum; srednja Habano uz VSOP/XO, speyside ili solera rum; maduro uz XO, armagnac, brandy de Jerez ili peated whisky.

App ti predlaže spojeve po pravilima — ti biraš što voliš. Zabilježi u Kolekciji što ti sjelo.
body.en:
Simple rule: mild Connecticut with VSOP/VS cognac, fino sherry or light rum; medium Habano with VSOP/XO, Speyside or solera rum; maduro with XO, armagnac, brandy de Jerez or peated whisky.

The app suggests matches by rules — you choose what you like. Note in Collection what worked.

title.en: How to read a brandy label

body.hr:
Redoslijed: 1) kategorija (Cognac, Armagnac, Calvados, Brandy de Jerez, vinjak…), 2) dob (VS / VSOP / XO ili godine), 3) cru ili podregija ako postoji (Grande Champagne, Pays d'Auge, Bas-Armagnac).

Kategorija govori što piješ; dob i cru daju detalj. Zaštićeni nazivi (Cognac, Armagnac, Calvados…) smiju nositi samo proizvodi iz pripadajuće regije.
body.en:
Order: 1) category (Cognac, Armagnac, Calvados, Brandy de Jerez, vinjak…), 2) age (VS / VSOP / XO or years), 3) cru or sub-region if stated (Grande Champagne, Pays d'Auge, Bas-Armagnac).

Category tells you what you are drinking; age and cru add detail. Protected names (Cognac, Armagnac, Calvados…) are reserved for products from their regions.

body.hr:
Na konjaku (i često na calvadosu/armagnacu) oznake govore o najmlađoj komponenti u blendu: VS ≥ 2 godine, VSOP ≥ 4, XO ≥ 10 (od 2018.). To je sustav dozrijevanja, jednako kao godine na scotch etiketi.

Hors d'âge i XXO su marketing/kućne oznake iznad XO — nema jednog EU broja za sve.
body.en:
On cognac (and often on calvados/armagnac) the marks refer to the youngest component in the blend: VS ≥ 2 years, VSOP ≥ 4, XO ≥ 10 (since 2018). It is an ageing system, just like the years on a scotch label.

Hors d'âge and XXO are house marks above XO — there is no single EU number for all of them.

body.hr:
Konjak: dvaput u bakrenom Charentais pot stillu (~70 % ulaza u bačvu). Armagnac: jednom u kolonskom alambiku (52–60 %) — više kongenera, rustikalniji profil. Calvados Pays d'Auge: jabukovača dvaput kroz pot still.

Ista »obitelj« brandyja, različiti alati — zato armagnac često djeluje zemljanije od svilenkastog konjaka.
body.en:
Cognac: twice in a copper Charentais pot still (~70% into cask). Armagnac: once in a column alambic (52–60%) — more congeners, a rustic profile. Calvados Pays d'Auge: cider twice through a pot still.

Same brandy family, different tools — that is why armagnac often tastes earthier than silky cognac.

body.hr:
Limousin hrast (širi godovi) daje konjaku više tanina; Tronçais finije zrno i eleganciju. Vlažan chai gubi više alkohola i mekša stil; suh koncentrira okus.

Bourbon mora u NOVE opaljene bačve; scotch često u rabljene bourbon ili sherry butts. Brandy de Jerez: solera u bivšim sherry butts — dinamičko miješanje kroz criaderas.
body.en:
Limousin oak (wider grain) lends cognac more tannin; Tronçais finer grain and elegance. A damp chai loses more alcohol and softens style; a dry one concentrates flavour.

Bourbon must use NEW charred barrels; scotch often uses ex-bourbon or sherry butts. Brandy de Jerez: solera in former sherry butts — dynamic blending through criaderas.

title.en: Rum and whisky — a quick compass

body.hr:
Rum: melasa vs agricole (sok trske); EU limit 20 g/L dodanog šećera za naziv »rum«. Scotch: dob = najmlađa komponenta, min. 3 godine u Škotskoj. Bourbon: ≥51 % kukuruza, SAD, nove opaljene bačve.

Single malt = jedna destilerija + 100 % ječmeni slad — ne nužno jedna bačva (to je single cask). Peat (ppm) mjeri dimljeni karakter.
body.en:
Rum: molasses vs agricole (cane juice); EU cap 20 g/L added sugar to still be called 'rum'. Scotch: age = youngest component, min. 3 years in Scotland. Bourbon: ≥51% corn, USA, new charred barrels.

Single malt = one distillery + 100% malted barley — not necessarily one cask (that is single cask). Peat (ppm) measures smoky character.

title.en: Wine and port with a cigar

body.hr:
Tawny porto i PX sherry vole maduro (orah, karamela). Ruby porto i mladi crveni — oprez: tanini mogu gorko reagirati s dimom. Amarone i zreli plavac često bolje nose srednje cigare.

Fino/manzanilla — suhi, slani — sjaju uz Connecticut i lagani lunch cigar. Prošek (HR) je passito desertno vino, ne prosecco.
body.en:
Tawny port and PX sherry love maduro (walnut, caramel). Ruby port and young reds — care: tannins can clash bitter with smoke. Amarone and mature plavac often carry medium cigars better.

Fino/manzanilla — dry, saline — shine with Connecticut and a light lunch cigar. Prošek (HR) is a passito dessert wine, not prosecco.

body.hr:
Snifter za konjak/armagnac; Glencairn/tulipan za whisky; tumbler za rocks/highball. Ne grij konjak nad plamenom — ruka na zdjeli dovoljna je ako želiš toplinu.

Kap vode u cask strength whiskyju »otvara« arome. Led u brandyju razrjeđuje — biraj svjesno. Espresso uz talijanski brandy ili grappu je klasik nakon jela.
body.en:
Snifter for cognac/armagnac; Glencairn/tulip for whisky; tumbler for rocks/highball. Do not warm cognac over a flame — a hand on the bowl is enough if you want heat.

A drop of water in cask-strength whisky 'opens' aromas. Ice in brandy dilutes — choose it on purpose. Espresso with Italian brandy or grappa is a classic after a meal.

title.en: Additives: what the label (does not) say

body.hr:
EU rum: iznad 20 g/L šećera → »spirit drink«. Scotch smije E150a karamel. Konjak: šećer, E150a i boisé do 4 % obskuracije, bez obveze na etiketi.

App bilježi additiveStatus kad znamo — transparentnost, ne kazna. Foursquare i slične kuće deklariraju »bez aditiva« kao stilski izbor.
body.en:
EU rum: above 20 g/L sugar → 'spirit drink'. Scotch may use E150a caramel. Cognac: sugar, E150a and boisé up to 4% obscuration, with no labelling duty.

The app records additiveStatus when known — transparency, not a penalty. Houses like Foursquare declare 'no additives' as a style choice.

body.hr:
Snifter (balon) skuplja arome konjaka/armagnaca. Glencairn ili tulipan za whisky usmjerava nos. Tumbler/rocks za highball ili led. Za fino sherry — uža čaša (copita).

Jedna dobra čaša vrijedi više od seta koji ne koristiš. Operi bez mirisa deterdženta — ostatak kvari degustaciju.
body.en:
A snifter gathers cognac/armagnac aromas. A Glencairn or tulip focuses a whisky nose. Tumbler/rocks for highballs or ice. Fino sherry prefers a narrower glass (copita).

One good glass beats a set you never use. Wash without scented detergent — residue spoils tasting.

body.hr:
Kupi veći nego što misliš — cigare trebaju zrak. Španjolski cedar unutra; digihigrometar; Boveda paketi za RH. Putni humidor (5–10) za večer vani; kućni za zalihu.

Drži dalje od sunca i grijanja. Kabineti (stotine cigara) imaju smisla tek kad zaliha raste — počni s desktop kutijom.
body.en:
Buy larger than you think — cigars need air. Spanish cedar inside; digital hygrometer; Boveda packs for RH. Travel humidor (5–10) for evenings out; home box for stock.

Keep away from sun and radiators. Cabinets (hundreds of cigars) make sense only as stock grows — start with a desktop box.

body.hr:
Dvostruki guillotine pokriva većinu vitola. V-cut za figurado i veće ring gauge. Punch za uži vučni kanal. Jeftin tupi rezač kidati će omotač.

Čisti oštrice od ulja duhana. Nosilac u džepu ili futroli — tupi rezač na dnu torbe je gori od nemanja.
body.en:
A double guillotine covers most vitolas. A V-cut for figurados and larger ring gauges. A punch for a tighter draw. A cheap dull cutter will tear wrappers.

Clean blades of tobacco oils. Carry it in a pocket or sleeve — a dull cutter at the bottom of a bag is worse than none.

body.hr:
Cigarska pepeljara ima duboki utor — cigara leži stabilno, pepeo pada unutra. Velika površina; lako se čisti. Staklo, keramika ili metal bez jakog mirisa.

Putna limenka za pepeo pomaže vani. Kava ili vino pepeo ne zamjenjuju.
body.en:
A cigar ashtray has a deep notch — the cigar sits steady, ash falls inside. Generous surface; easy to clean. Glass, ceramic or metal without a strong smell.

A pocket ash tin helps outdoors. A coffee cup is not a substitute.

body.hr:
Dekantera čuva whisky/brandy na polici i olakšava posluživanje. Staklo držati izvan jakog svjetla — svjetlost i toplina kvare destilat. Označi što je unutra.

Za svakodnevno pijenje boca s dobrim čepom često je dovoljna. Ako dekanteraš, potroši sadržaj u mjesecima, ne godinama.
body.en:
A decanter looks better on the shelf and eases pouring. Keep glass out of strong light — light and heat spoil spirit. Label what is inside.

For daily drinking, the bottle with a good cork is often enough. If you decant, finish the contents in months, not years.

body.hr:
Butan torch ili soft flame bez mirisa. Cedar spill daje kontroliran plamen za rub. Soft flame manje peče omotač od agresivnog torcha na blizu.

Drži rezervni plin. Jet torch je praktičan na vjetru; soft flame ugodniji za desk lighting.
body.en:
Odourless butane torch or soft flame. A cedar spill gives a controlled flame for the rim. Soft flame scorches the wrapper less than a torch held too close.

Keep spare fuel. A jet torch helps in wind; soft flame is kinder for desk lighting.

body.hr:
1) Digihigrometar + malo humidora ili putna kutija. 2) Dvostruki guillotine. 3) Butan soft flame. 4) Pepeljara s utorom. 5) Jedna Glencairn ili snifter.

Ostatak (V-cut, punch, kabinet, dekantera) dodaješ kad znaš što ti fali. Bolje pet dobrih alata nego ladica punih loših.
body.en:
1) Digital hygrometer + a small humidor or travel case. 2) Double guillotine. 3) Butane soft flame. 4) Notched ashtray. 5) One Glencairn or snifter.

Add the rest (V-cut, punch, cabinet, decanter) when you know what you miss. Five good tools beat a drawer of poor ones.

title.en: Slow down — heat is the enemy

body.hr: Prebrzo vučenje peče duhan. Ako pepeo postane crn i vruć, stani minutu. Cigara će se »oporaviti«. Isto vrijedi za degustaciju: miris prvo, gutljaj poslije, pa dim.
body.en: Drawing too fast cooks the tobacco. If the ash goes black and hot, pause a minute. The cigar will recover. Same for tasting: nose first, sip second, then smoke.

body.hr: Čista voda čisti nepce između gutljaja i dimova. Kava i gazirana pića mogu umrtviti fine note. Ako piješ cask strength, kap vode u čaši otvara arome — ne moraš piti »na čisto« da dokažeš nešto.
body.en: Plain water clears the palate between sips and puffs. Coffee and fizz can mute fine notes. If you drink cask strength, a drop of water in the glass opens aromas — neat is a choice, not a test of character.

body.hr: Teški obrok + jaka maduro + XO može biti previše. Lakši pairing: Connecticut + VSOP nakon ručka; ozbiljna cigara sat vremena nakon večere. Čokolada i orasi vole maduro i tawny — sir s jakim taninom može zategnuti dim.
body.en: A heavy meal + strong maduro + XO can be too much. Lighter pairing: Connecticut + VSOP after lunch; a serious cigar an hour after dinner. Chocolate and nuts love maduro and tawny — high-tannin cheese can tighten the smoke.

body.hr: Cigare iz trgovine često putuju. Daj im nekoliko dana u humidoru da se RH izjednači prije nego ih sudiš. »Tight draw« prvog dana ponekad nestane nakon odmora.
body.en: Shop cigars often travel. Give them a few days in the humidor so RH equalises before you judge them. A first-day tight draw sometimes eases after a rest.

body.hr: U Kolekciji zabilježi: vitola, piće, što ti se svidjelo, što ne. Nakon 20 unosa vidiš obrazac — »volim Connecticut + fino« ili »maduro + Jerez«. App pairing je orijentir; tvoj dnevnik je istina.
body.en: In Collection note: vitola, drink, what you liked, what you did not. After 20 entries a pattern appears — 'I like Connecticut + fino' or 'maduro + Jerez'. App pairing is a compass; your log is the truth.

body.hr: Vjetar ubrzava sagorevanje — zakloni se ili koristi jet torch pažljivo. Visoka vanjska vlaga može omekšati vučenje; suhi zimski zrak suši kraj cigare. Putni humidor drži noćnu rezervu u redu.
body.en: Wind speeds the burn — shelter or use a jet torch carefully. High outdoor humidity can soften the draw; dry winter air dries the foot. A travel humidor keeps the evening reserve in order.

body.hr: Bolje tri dobre večeri mjesečno nego petnaest prosječnih. Kupi jednu solidnu čašu i rezač prije desetog »jeftinog« alata. U Shoppingu app pokazuje praznine u kolekciji — koristi to kao popis, ne kao imperativ.
body.en: Three good evenings a month beat fifteen average ones. Buy one solid glass and cutter before a tenth cheap tool. In Shopping the app shows collection gaps — treat that as a list, not an order.

body.hr: Drži blagu i srednju cigaru + jedno pristupačno piće (VSOP, tawny, ne peated bombu). Pitaj vole li dimljeno. Rezač i pepeljara na stolu — gost ne treba improvizirati s kuhinjskim nožem.
body.en: Keep a mild and a medium cigar plus one approachable drink (VSOP, tawny, not a peat bomb). Ask if they like smoke. Cutter and ashtray on the table — guests should not improvise with a kitchen knife.
